title: Momonosuke Appears
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8. The central beat is momonosuke appears.
scene: The scene focuses on momonosuke appears, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: of what nonsense Dost thou speak!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ehh!? This Eel is actually speaking!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You sound pretty hungry too, huh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: and untold strength, that they art.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I am momono- suke, that I am!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I see. Thou art also an outsider...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Though I caused such a fuss...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Did I not already make myself clear!!

summary: Momonosuke Appears. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
